message.low: Your indicators are within a stable range. Keep preventive monitoring active.

basic.description: Essential plan for small clinics that need monitoring, staff management and basic risk control.

professional.description: Recommended plan for medium-sized clinics that need full operation, clinical prevention, audit and administrative reports.

enterprise.description: Advanced plan for large hospitals, clinical networks and organizations with multiple sites, integrations and large-scale operations.
